primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive CKD staging, progression management, and complications

primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2017 Clinical Practice Guideline Update for the Diagnosis, Evaluation, Prevention, and Treatment of Chronic Kidney Disease–Mineral and Bone Disorder (CKD-MBD)
primary_sources.relevance: Authoritative guidance on CKD-MBD management and monitoring

primary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for Anemia in Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Evidence-based recommendations for CKD anemia diagnosis and treatment

primary_sources.name: NKF KDOQI Clinical Practice Guideline for Nutrition in CKD: 2020 Update
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive dietary management recommendations for CKD patients

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases - CKD Management Reviews
secondary_sources.relevance: Peer-reviewed research on emerging CKD therapies and management strategies

gaps: Updated KDIGO anemia guidelines (2012 version may need supplementation with recent literature)
Specific guidance on newer SGLT2 inhibitor use in CKD may require recent journal articles
